title: Halanit

'''Halanit''' was an ichthyoculture [[Moon/Legends|moon]] colonized around [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. The moon orbited a large [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]], and was covered with a thick ice crust, but beneath it crust the inner heat of the moon's core created pockets of breathable atmosphere. The primary settlement was just below the [[Water/Legends|ice]], in a fissure that was covered by a double-paneled [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] dome. It was an insignificant world for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] with a low population just over 10.000 people.

During the early stages of the [[Bacta War]], the major colony on Halanit was ravaged by a virus that was very similar to the [[Cardooine Chills]]. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] provided the Halanites with a load of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] taken from one of [[Ysanne Isard]]'s convoys. Shortly thereafter, however, the population of Halanit was [[Battle of Halanit|wiped out]] by [[Ait Convarion]] and the [[Thyferran Home Defense Corps]] for accepting the bacta.

[[Gavin Darklighter]], who was refueling his [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] there before the attack tried to protect the colonists. Grossly outnumbered, he was forced to flee the moon after inflicting as much damage as he could.

After the short battle, the [[Victory II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter/Legends|''Corrupter'']] initiated a [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|planetary barrage]] that expanded the damage done by the [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] and [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] sent ships for rescue purposes but none of the colonists survived the attack.
